summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TripSync AI-powered travel planning platform. Auth refresh loop issue is FIXED - login/dashboard access working. Admin panel functional. Registration flow working. Session persistence issues remain causing frequent logouts during extended flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires frequently during extended user flows, causing redirects to auth page
ui_bugs.selector: Affects all protected routes after ~2-3 minutes of activity

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full create trip flow due to session expiration during multi-step process
affected_selectors: Trip type selection works, but form submission interrupted by logout
integration_issues.details: Trip type selection loads correctly with 9 options (Weekend Getaway, Bachelor Party, etc.) but session expires before completion

integration_issues.issue: Limited testing of preferences, recommendations, voting flows due to session persistence

design_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in BrowserRouter/Auth

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and navigation
Auth page navigation from landing page works
Admin login successful with admin@tripsync.com/admin123 - AUTH REFRESH LOOP FIXED
Dashboard loads correctly with 'My Trips' heading and 'New Trip' button
Admin panel accessible for admin user with users table showing 2 users
Admin panel shows trips section with proper navigation tabs
Create trip page loads with 9 trip type options (Weekend Getaway, Bachelor Party, etc.)
User registration flow works completely - form fills and submits successfully
New user dashboard loads correctly with 'No trips yet' message and 'Create Your First Trip' button
Session authentication works for initial login and immediate navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue - tokens/cookies expire too quickly causing frequent logouts during user flows. This prevents complete testing of trip creation, workspace, preferences, recommendations, and voting flows. The auth refresh loop issue was successfully fixed, but session duration needs improvement.
